name: 情感選擇型結尾
description: Noah求婚與Richard求復合同時發生，女主在兩個男人之間做出最終選擇。結尾留有餘韻——女主回憶童年夢想「當導演」，呼應全劇的自我實現主題。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Will you marry me? ... Michelle, please. I know I screwed up. Give me another chance. ... What do you want to be when you grow up? A director like you. That's my girl. Grandma, I did it.
